restatement.goal: 修复 `tools/learn.py` / `tools/codex_transport.py` 在 app-server 真实 plan 同频后未稳定落出 `learn/<project_id>.model.json` 的问题，确保 `ready` 能基于有效 model packet 继续通过。
restatement.scope: tools/learn.py, tools/codex_transport.py, tests/, TASKS/, reports/, docs/
restatement.acceptance: app-server final-answer 事件可稳定产出可解析的 learn model packet; learn/<project_id>.model.json 在真实 learn 运行后稳定落盘; python3 tools/ready.py 在完成 learn 后恢复通过; 新增或刷新关键回归测试; make verify 通过; Evidence updated: reports/{RUN_ID}/summary.md and reports/{RUN_ID}/decision.md
restatement.stop_condition: finish and wait for next instruction; if blocked, record stop reason in decision.md
